hero.subtitle_en: Classic cuts, fades, and hot-towel shaves. Walk in or book online in under a minute.
hero.subtitle_el: Κουρέματα, βαφές και styling. Περάστε ή κλείστε online.

items.desc_en: Scissor or clipper cut with a sharp finish.
items.desc_el: Με ψαλίδι ή μηχανή, καθαρό τελείωμα.

items.desc_en: Hand-painted lights, gloss, cut and blow-dry.
items.desc_el: Hand-painted ανταύγειες, gloss, κούρεμα και styling.

items.desc_en: Full colour and precision cut, finished and styled.

about.title_en: A barber shop, the way it should be.
about.p1_en: Oakline opened in South Kensington in 2018 with one chair, one stylist, and a stubborn idea: take the time, do the work properly, and people come back.
about.p1_el: Ανοίξαμε στο South Kensington το 2018. Μία καρέκλα, ένας stylist, μία ιδέα: χρόνο στη δουλειά και ο κόσμος ξανάρχεται.
about.p2_en: Eight years later we've added two more chairs and a small team — but the philosophy hasn't budged. No production line. No rushing. Just sharp work in a quiet, well-lit room with good music and proper coffee.
about.p2_el: Οκτώ χρόνια μετά έχουμε τρεις καρέκλες — αλλά όχι γραμμή παραγωγής. Ήσυχος χώρος, σωστή μουσική, καλός καφές.
about.p3_en: We work on classic cuts, modern fades, full beard sculpting, and the kind of hot-towel shave you book the day before. Walk-ins welcome when chairs are open.
about.p3_el: Precision cuts, βαφές, treatments, styling. Walk-in όποτε βρίσκεις κενό.

items.a_en: We recommend booking online — chairs fill up fast. Walk-ins are welcome whenever a chair is free.
items.a_el: Κλείσε online — γεμίζουμε γρήγορα. Walk-in δεκτό όταν έχει κενό.

items.a_en: Free cancellation up to 4 hours before your slot. After that we ask for 50% of the service price.
items.a_el: Ναι, δωρεάν μέχρι 4 ώρες πριν. Μετά χρεώνουμε 50%.

items.a_en: Card, cash, Apple Pay, Google Pay — all good. Tips appreciated, never expected.
items.a_el: Κάρτα, μετρητά, Apple/Google Pay. Όλα καλά.

items.q_el: Μπορώ να φέρω το παιδί μου;
items.a_en: Of course. We have a dedicated kids cut and our team is patient with young clients.
items.a_el: Φυσικά. Έχουμε παιδικό κούρεμα και πολλή υπομονή.

items.a_en: 47 Cranley Mews, South Kensington, London SW7 3BY. Two minutes from Gloucester Road tube.
items.a_el: 47 Cranley Mews, SW7. Δύο λεπτά από Gloucester Road.

blocks.value_en:

South Kensington, London SW7 3BY
blocks.value_el:

items.quote_en: Best precision cut in SW7, easily. Hannah takes her time and the finish is razor sharp.
items.quote_el: Το καλύτερο precision cut που έχω κάνει. Παίρνει χρόνο και φαίνεται.
items.name: George M.

items.quote_en: Balayage + treatment was a religious experience. Walked out a different person.
items.quote_el: Balayage και treatment — βγήκα άλλος άνθρωπος.
items.name: Sophia K.

items.quote_en: Booking online is dead simple. Show up, sit down, leave looking sharp.
items.quote_el: Online κράτηση σε ένα λεπτό. Χωρίς φασαρία.
items.name: Daniel L.

cta.title_en: The next chair has your name on it.
cta.subtitle_en: Book in under a minute. Choose your service, your barber, and the time that works.
cta.subtitle_el: Κράτηση σε ένα λεπτό. Υπηρεσία, stylist, ώρα — έτοιμο.

page_services.title_en: Cuts, beards, and the full ritual.
page_services.sub_en: Honest pricing, real time slots. Add a beard or hot shave to any cut at the chair.

page_gallery.title_en: Inside the shop. On the chair.
page_gallery.sub_en: A look at the room, the team, and the work that walks out the door.
page_gallery.sub_el: Ο χώρος, η ομάδα, η δουλειά μας.

page_team.sub_en: The chairs at Oakline are run by three stylists who care about the work and the people in front of them.
page_team.sub_el: Τρεις stylists που νοιάζονται για τη δουλειά και τον πελάτη.

page_contact.title_el: Θα μας βρεις στο South Kensington.
page_contact.sub_en: Two minutes from Gloucester Road tube. Flat-white next door, coffee on the bench while you wait.
page_contact.sub_el: Δύο λεπτά από το Gloucester Road. Καφές δίπλα.

page_book.title_en: Pick a chair, pick a time.
page_book.sub_en: Takes about a minute. You'll get an email confirmation and a reminder 8 hours before your appointment.
page_book.sub_el: Σε ένα λεπτό. Θα λάβεις email και υπενθύμιση 8 ώρες πριν.

footer.lede_en: Classic cuts, modern fades, and the kind of hot-towel shave you book the day before. Walk-ins welcome when the chairs are open.
footer.lede_el: Precision cuts, βαφές με φροντίδα, styling που κρατάει. Walk-in όταν υπάρχει κενό.
